summary: Tight, energetic performance highlighted by a scorching China>Rider; the audience tape is modest but still captures the band’s tightness.
review: Fans rave about the show’s tight playing and high energy across both sets, singling out the China>Rider sequence as a standout moment. The recording is an audience tape with typical amphitheater ambience – not pristine, but good enough to convey the vibe of the night.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (tight, energetic, standout China>Rider) weighted heavily; recording is only fair/average but does not detract significantly from enjoyment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Typical amphitheater audience tape – not the best clarity, some muffled sections and ambient crowd noise, but captures the concert atmosphere.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets flow smoothly; the band stays tight and energetic throughout, keeping the crowd engaged from afternoon into night.
